summary: Repository context now separates active current state from historical documentation. Agents should read docs/MANIFEST.json and .agents/current/*.json before consulting broader docs.

current_task_policy.default_history_policy: Do not read historical logs or archived audits unless explicitly asked.
current_task_policy.context_log_policy: Append sanitized machine-readable entries to .agents/logs/context.jsonl for state transitions or superseded assumptions.

historical_docs_policy.read_condition: explicit user request for historical investigation or regression archaeology
